Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Through her 36 years in the Army as a nurse and medic, Laura Ludwig faced many challenges. None more difficult than taking care of the young men and women who served in Iraq and Afghanistan. Since coming home Laura has not stopped serving.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Nurse Laura Ludwig
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This weeks episode we do somethingi've never done before. we ice fish lake trout but we can see about 30 feet down through the clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sight Fishing Giant Lake Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: As fall grips Northern Ontario, unpredictable weather makes fishing a true test of patience and perseverance. Paul is joined by young angler Matthew, who’s finishing university and weighing the decision to stay in the North. Facing extreme cold on their first attempt, the duo regroup and return a few days later to a new lake, chasing walleye and capturing the stunning wilderness that makes Northern Ontario a fall angler’s paradise.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Fall Walleye Challenge

Video.summary: Remote Northern Wilderness, Smallmouth Bass Fishing part 2
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Northern Wilderness Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Father Son Challenge Part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Father Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Billy Rosner chase walleyes and more on Minnesota's vast Lake Vermilion while discussing the merits of a family sport called fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling - Visiting Vermilion
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Smallmouth Bass in quantities in this episode. A Thanksgiving tradition.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON | Smallmouth Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Friend and fellow Michigander, Brian McCarter turns Kim on to a productive pattern for autumn largemouths. Suspended schools of bluegills set the stage for this informative episode. The Strike King Sexy Spoon is the featured lure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Just a Spoonful
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe South Georgia Showdown_rd
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we take some first-time anglers offshore to Santa Catalina Island and teach them how to fish for Yellowtail and Calico Bass. We also get a chance to check out some of the cool features of Simrad electronics has to offer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Santa Catalina Island Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Tuna fishing is all about timing. Our friends from Okuma Fishing Tackle had a small window of time to come fishing with us, and the timing could not have been better. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we head to San Clemente Island and experience an epic day of West Coast Yellowfin fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Yellowfin Tuna Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw proves why lipless crankbaits are must-have weapons in the bass angler's arsenal.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — Lipless in Kissimmee
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode we pass on the angling tradition to the next generation with some Louisiana bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Passing the Tradition
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee hangs out with some friends while fishing in a private lake called Lake Palmdale, also known as the Fin and Feather. Today is its opening day for the year, which is stocking day. The lake is full of fish, and everyone has a blast Trout fishing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked On Fishing
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — Fin and Feather Opening Day Trout Fishing

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — Fin and Feather Opening Day Trout Fishing
Stoked on Fishing — Fin and Feather Opening Day Trout Fishing
Stoked on Fishing — Fin and Feather Opening Day Trout Fishing

Video.summary: We're heading to Lake Gogebic this week to find some GIANT Perch and walleye! Joined by Chris Fish and Justin Soffa, this will surely be a fishing smackdown!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building Bladed Jigs
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains where to find bass under bluebird skies
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Bluebird Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Four
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with 2023 Bass Master Classic Champion Jeff Gustafson
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Jeff "Gussy" Gustafson
Video.title: Episode 1
